description: Production-ready dashboard for .NET API (GerAdv) with Prometheus/OpenTelemetry: HTTP, SLOs, business metrics, .NET runtime and Kestrel.

panels.title: 📊 Overview & SLOs
Total Throughput
panels.description: Requests per second (all routes).

panels.title: Error Rate %
panels.description: Percentage of 4xx/5xx responses over total.

panels.title: SLO Latência P99 < ${slo_latency_p99}s
panels.description: Latency SLO compliance percentage (P99 < target).

panels.title: SLO Success Rate > ${slo_success_rate}%
panels.description: Success rate (non-5xx) in %.

panels.title: Remaining Error Budget (SLO 99.9%)
panels.description: Remaining error budget based on 99.9% availability SLO (30-day window). Values close to 0% indicate budget exhausted.

panels.title: 🌐 Detailed HTTP Metrics
Request Rate by Method
panels.description: Request rate by HTTP method.

panels.title: Active Requests
panels.description: Total active requests on HTTP server.

panels.title: HTTP Latency (P50/P95/P99)
panels.description: HTTP latency by quantile (P50/P95/P99).

panels.title: Status HTTP (req/s)
panels.description: Response rate by status code.

panels.title: Detailed Error Rate (4xx/5xx/Total)
panels.description: Breakdown of 4xx/5xx errors and total in percentage.

panels.title: 🧠 .NET Runtime Metrics
GC Collections (by generation)
panels.description: GC collection rate by generation.

panels.title: Memory Usage (Working Set)
panels.description: .NET process working set.

panels.title: Heap Size (last collection) - Stacked
panels.description: Heap size observed at last collection (by generation).

panels.title: .NET Exceptions (by type)
panels.description: Exception rate by type.

panels.title: Thread Pool
panels.description: Thread pool: threads and queue.

panels.title: 🌐 Kestrel Metrics
Active Connections (Kestrel)
panels.description: Active connections in Kestrel.

panels.title: Queued Connections
panels.description: Queued connections waiting to start.

panels.title: Connection Duration P95 (Kestrel)
panels.description: P95 of connection duration in Kestrel.

panels.title: 💚 Health Checks Metrics
Status Geral Health Checks
panels.description: Status geral de todos os health checks.

panels.title: Taxa de Execução Health Checks
panels.description: Taxa de execução dos health checks por tipo e status.

panels.title: Connection Pool - Estatísticas
panels.description: Estatísticas do pool de conexões.

panels.title: Handles - Contagem
panels.description: Contagem de handles e crescimento.

panels.title: Threads - Contagem
panels.description: Contagem de threads e crescimento.

panels.title: 🎯 Tenant Metrics by Entity
[Acao-Acao] - Requests (req/s) by Tenant
panels.description: Requests by operation and tenant (controller: Acao-Acao).

panels.title: [Acao-Acao] - P95 Duration (ms) by Tenant
panels.description: P95 duration by operation and tenant (controller: Acao-Acao).

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(acao_request_duration_ms_milliseconds_bucket{instance=~"$instance", tenant_id=~"$tenant", job="geradv-api"}[5m])) by (le, operacao, tenant_id))

panels.title: [Acao-Acao] - Records Created by Hour/Tenant
panels.description: Records created by hour and tenant (controller: Acao-Acao).

targets.expr: sum by (tenant_id) (rate(acao_records_returned_sum{instance=~"$instance", tenant_id=~"$tenant", job="geradv-api"}[5m])) / sum by (tenant_id) (rate(acao_records_returned_count{instance=~"$instance", tenant_id=~"$tenant", job="geradv-api"}[5m]))
